scope: FQ-09R: review hardening — replace the foreground/background tree split with one unified tree rule (leafy, walk-past, harvestable) and surface live character/world ownership rules in the creation forms, with no new mechanics.
summary: Unified trees: WorldGen grows a tree_trunk column (3-5 tall) plus a tree_leaves canopy (3x2) at every tree site, both into the normal cells grid. The blocks are data-only additions reusing existing fields: non-solid (no collision polygon, so the player walks in front of/past every tree), non-placeable, no occlusion; trunk carries wood's 0.55 hardness, axe preference, and 1-wood drop, so the entire mining/axe/drop contract is inherited unchanged (frames dirt 21 / trunk 33 / stone 66 / axe 24). Leaves clear fast and drop nothing. The FQ-02 split machinery is fully retired: background_cells, the BackgroundFlora TileMapLayer, bg_trunk/bg_canopy textures, world.background_at, and generation.tree_foreground_ratio (default, ui_help, and the Solid Tree Ratio world-builder slider). Old world configs storing the ratio key are ignored harmlessly; mined tree cells persist as normal air deltas; tree ids can never enter deltas. Placed wood is untouched (solid, buildable, roof/shelter). Creation clarity: the character form states carried-state ownership, one-time role grants, and 'Collapse loses a fraction of carried stacks' (wording corrected from 'drops' — items are destroyed, not ground-dropped); the world form states world-owned terrain/stockpile/threats/storms/base level/player level/position/health and cross-character entry behavior. Every claim was fact-checked against live code paths by a recon scout.
acceptance: Smoke proves generated trees have leaves: 54 trunks / 84 leaf cells on default config, seed 777 (fq09r_trees_have_leaves)

Smoke proves walk-past: all 138 tree cells non-solid and bare-hand mineable, 0 violations (fq09r_trees_passable_and_harvestable); live walk check passes x=2279.0 past target 2216.0 with only move_right (fq09r_player_walks_past_tree)

Smoke proves harvest through the existing path: mining a trunk yields exactly 1 wood and an air cell (fq09r_harvest_trunk_yields_wood); axe speeds trunk mining 33 -> 24 frames (wave_f checks retargeted)
No walkable-but-not-harvestable tree class remains; leaves clear without drops (fq09r_leaves_clear_without_drops); density 0 clears all tree cells and density scales trunk count (54 -> 84 at 2.0)
Creation/help text states live collapse loss and character/world ownership boundaries without implying future mechanics
Smoke 183/183 (8 fq02_* checks replaced by 8 fq09r_*, total unchanged) on waited windowed Godot 4.6.1; validator PASS; capsule doctor healthy; git diff --check clean
validation: python scripts/validate_repo.py -> PASS (new tree blocks satisfy preferred_tool policy; 2 new INFO fallback-art lines only)
COHERONIA_SMOKE=1 waited windowed run -> 183/183 PASS at 2026-07-09T13:45:16 incl. all 8 fq09r_* checks and preserved frame baselines
decisions: Unified trees are non-solid cells in the normal block grid rather than a special layer — can_mine never checks is_solid (berry_bush precedent), so walk-past + harvestable required zero new mechanics
tree_trunk deliberately shares wood's hardness/preference/drop so every existing mining, axe, and frame-count contract is inherited; the smoke baselines only retargeted which block they harvest

Placed wood remains a distinct solid block: building, roofs, and shelter math are untouched; generated trees intentionally stop contributing to shelter/occlusion (they are scenery + resource, not structure)
tree_foreground_ratio was removed rather than deprecated — stored copies in old world configs are ignored harmlessly and no code path reads the key
Leaves drop nothing (no new resource economy) and trees have no support rule (floating cells after partial harvest mirror the old floating wood columns; cosmetic)
Prior-session creation notes were audited rather than rewritten; the one factual wording bug (drops vs loses) was fixed

Swarm pipeline: 2 haiku recon scouts (tree surface map; creation-note fact-check), one implementation lane (orchestrator), sonnet diff review -> SIGNABLE with zero blockers; 1 nit fixed, 1 pre-existing should-fix recorded as a risk
risks: Generated trees no longer count toward shelter/roof/occlusion inputs; slight C/L/R drift near tree lines is intentional but untested by human play
Wood supply per world rose (every tree harvestable vs ~40% of sites before); numbers are data-tunable
Pre-FQ-09R worlds regenerate with unified trees where old solid columns/background flora stood; deltas overlay cleanly — cosmetic only
Pre-existing smoke hygiene: the baseline _mine_cell calls lack a null guard after mineable_blocks_found (a find failure would crash the suite, not fail cleanly); candidate for a future smoke pass
next_action: FQ-09S: skill tree visual treatment pass.
